历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 27353 → 29760 → 31143 → 29726 → 35519, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2025, the ranking shifted back by about 5793 places compared to 2024, the largest decline in five years, with a baseline ranking of about 35519. The university's enrollment plan in Chongqing for Physics Category: 693 in 2021, 612 in 2022, 616 in 2023, 621 in 2024, 661 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 641, a decrease of 20 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 3.0%, which usually eases competition slightly and moves rankings forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science main ranking has been rising in recent years: 162nd in 2021 → 146th in 2022 → 142nd in 2023 → 134th in 2024 → 141st in 2025 → 134th in 2026, overall at the upper-middle level nationally, ranking high among agricultural and forestry universities; reputation has been generally stable and positive in recent years: in 2023, positive evaluations due to good cafeteria service and improved dormitory conditions; in 2022, attention was drawn due to the declining admission分数线, but the university responded promptly to maintain its image; Douyin popularity ranking 86th (average), short video exposure at a medium level, no obvious abnormal signals in application heat; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Animal Science was rated A, Crop Science A-, which are the university's core advantageous disciplines, directly related to enrollment majors such as Veterinary Medicine, Agronomy, Animal Science, Seed Science and Engineering, and have some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended; the university's popular Physics Category majors (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Data Science, etc.) benefit from industry trends; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Chongqing general college entrance examination is about 209,000, estimated at about 136,000 for Physics Category based on the recent proportion of about 65%, slightly lower than the 139,500 in 2025, with competition pressure basically flat; regarding provincial control lines, Chongqing Physics Category undergraduate batch: 446 in 2021 → 411 in 2022 → 406 in 2023 → 427 in 2024 → 425 in 2025, stable around 425 in recent years, with no significant fluctuations; Sichuan Agricultural University is located in Chengdu, adjacent to Chongqing, with strong regional preference among Sichuan-Chongqing candidates and high willingness to apply across provinces; the university's enrollment in Chongqing accounts for about 2.5%–5% of total national enrollment, at an upper-middle level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward fluctuation in 2025 rankings, the slight reduction in 2026 enrollment plan (competition slightly eased), the basically flat total number of candidates, and the stable and positive reputation, taking into account the partial correction pressure after the large backward shift in 2025 and the easing effect of the reduction, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 35074, with a range of 34574–35574.

If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<34574), you can focus on competitive majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering; if your ranking is in the middle of the range, you can safely choose advantageous majors such as Veterinary Medicine, Accounting, and Agronomy; if your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (>35574), you should use Tier 3 majors as safety to avoid slipping.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 7897 → 6229 → 6672 → 5570 → 5175, showing a continuous upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers, intensifying competition), with a cumulative upward shift of about 2722 positions over the past 4 years, and a 2025 baseline of about 5175. The university's enrollment plan in Chongqing for History Category: 218 in 2021, 179 in 2022, 178 in 2023, 163 in 2024, 133 in 2025; 2026 plan is 131, a decrease of 2 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 1.5%, which has minimal impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has been rising in recent years: 162nd in 2021 → 146th in 2022 → 142nd in 2023 → 134th in 2024 → 141st in 2025 → 134th in 2026, overall at the upper-middle level nationally. Recent reputation is generally stable and positive: in 2023, it received positive reviews for good cafeteria service and improved dormitory conditions; Douyin popularity ranking is 86th (average), with no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Animal Science (A) and Crop Science (A-) are the university's core advantageous disciplines. Although primarily agricultural and forestry, the History Category's Agricultural and Forestry Economic Management (Chengdu Campus) has disciplinary connections with Crop Science and Animal Science, while majors like Law, Auditing, and Accounting benefit from the university's 211 platform.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature are socially popular, with clear advantages for civil service exams; Accounting/Finance/Auditing majors have seen a resurgence in popularity to recommended levels. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Chongqing is about 209,000, with an estimated 73,000 in History Category based on the recent proportion of about 35%, roughly flat compared to 2025's 73,400. Regarding provincial control lines, Chongqing's History Category undergraduate batch: 456 in 2021 → 415 in 2022 → 407 in 2023 → 428 in 2024 → 438 in 2025, showing a steady increase in recent years, reflecting slightly intensified competition in liberal arts. Sichuan Agricultural University is located in Chengdu, adjacent to Chongqing, with strong regional preference among Sichuan and Chongqing candidates. The university's enrollment plan in Chongqing for History Category has been shrinking year by year (218 → 179 → 178 → 163 → 133 → 131), but rankings have continued to move forward, indicating that application popularity has not decreased but increased.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong trend of continuous forward movement in History Category rankings, the minimal reduction in the 2026 plan, the roughly flat total number of candidates, and the high popularity of liberal arts majors like Law and Accounting, and taking into account the inertia of recent ranking shifts and the warming application popularity for liberal arts majors, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 5048, with a range of 4548–5548.
